title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Reaches Out to Small Businesses With Latest Move
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) integrates generative AI techniques into Website Builder to deliver an enhanced experience to small entrepreneurs.

title: 4 Internet Delivery Service Stocks to Watch in a Thriving Industry
text: The Zacks Internet - Delivery Services industry participants like GDDY, VIPS, MMYT and ASUR are poised to benefit from the surging smartphone and Internet penetration in emerging markets.
